text.title: Vendor Evaluation Scorecard Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Vendor Evaluation Scorecard output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: scorecard_url populated with a typed value
weights populated with a typed value
trial_records populated with a typed value
decision_record populated with a typed value
contract_renewal_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
